title: Redstone Redmeption
description: A modpack  focused around adding content from the Red Dead Redemption series
body:
### **Disclamer!**
This Modpack is more roleplay focused than gameplay but it is possible to play in survival just don't expect me to fix any flaws in the modpack unless they are a big problem.

**There are already keybinds set up by me but feel free to tailor them to your liking.**

## **Core Elements:**
- **Terrain Generation** - 
Mods such as [Lithosphere](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lithosphere) allow for huge, cinematic terrain while [Biome Replacer](https://modrinth.com/mod/biome-replacer) is used to make sure only biomes that fit the the Red Dead Redmeption series can generate, such as: swamps, badlands and forests.

- **Weapons** - 
[Vic's Point Blank](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank), paired with [Red Dead Weaponry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/red-dead-weaponry), allows for smooth and fun gunplay that makes you feel like a true outlaw. The Original content from [Vic's Point Blank](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank) has also been disabled so that we dont get cowboys running around with fully automatic rifles but you can change this in the configs.

- **Deadeye** - 
The [Deadeye Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/deadeye-mod) adds exactly what's written on the tin. Deadeye. When playing with friends, I recomend using the configs to turn off "Deadeye Slowdown" for obvious reasons.

- **Animals** - 
I decided on the [Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist/versions) mod for the animals, since it was for Fabric 1.20.1 and configured it to remove unwanted mobs.

- **Other** - I have included a few other mods just to add decorations and building materials such as [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped) and [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries).
